transcript: Religion is a accustomarry. Tell me why I only ever pray when I'm nervous. I don't even love you, baby. Like all my other passions I've left you deserted. Take me to a monastery so I can light a candle and then ask for atonement.
text: Religion is a custom-marry. Tell me why I only ever pray when I'm nervous. I don't even love you, baby. Like all my other passions I've left you deserted. Take me to a monastery so I can light a candle and then ask for atonement.
